mapper.select: SELECT pr.*, u.id AS u_id, u.username AS u_username, u.nickname AS u_nickname, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM product_review pr LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE pr.user_id = #{userId} AND pr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC

SELECT pr.*, u.id AS u_id, u.username AS u_username, u.nickname AS u_nickname, u.avatar AS u_avatar FROM product_review pr LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE pr.id = #{reviewId} AND pr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
